name: tenant-template
description: Migration template. Copy this folder to tenants/<your-tenant>/ and rename the workspace before use.

scripts.migrate:content: tsx ../../scripts/run-with-log.ts "pnpm run extract && pnpm run tags && pnpm run transform && pnpm run assets && pnpm run import"
scripts.migrate:all: pnpm run migrate:schema && pnpm run typegen
scripts.migrate: tsx ../../scripts/run-with-log.ts "pnpm run extract && pnpm run tags && pnpm run migrate:schema && pnpm run transform && pnpm run assets && pnpm run import -- --discard-drafts"
